name: Moment of Sentencing
descs:
[Effects apply only to #3, #4 Deployed Identities]

Unopposed Slash Skills deal +10% damage

Clash Win: Slash Skills deal +(40/# of remaining Coins)% damage

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, and #5 Deployed Identities]

Unopposed Slash Skills deal +10% damage

Clash Win: Slash Skills deal +(40/# of remaining Coins)% damage

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, #5, and #6 Deployed Identities]

Unopposed Slash Skills deal +12.5% damage

Clash Win: Slash Skills deal +(50/# of remaining Coins)% damage
